raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo Eṣbons bija Siona /
ta Amoriteru Kehnina Pils-
fahts / un wiſch bija karrojis
prett to pirnu Moabiteru Keh-
ninu/ un bija wiſſi winna Sem-
mi no winna Rohkahm nehmis /
lihds Arnonam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz tohp fakkama
Wahrda faazzihts : Nahzeet Eṣ-
bona/ ka uhstaifihts un apstip-
rinahts tohp tas Siona Pils-
fahts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo weens Ugguns irr iṣ-
gahjis no Eṣbona/ un weena Leeſ-
ma no Siona Pilsfahta/ ta irr
aprihjuſi to Moabiteru Arru/ un
tohs Kungus to Augsto Arnona
Weetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Waj tew Moabs! juhs
Rahmofa Landis effat pasuddnu-
ſchi/winna Dehli irr speesti behgt/
un winna Meitas irr Zeetuma
westas Sionam / to Amoriteru
Kehninam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Spohschuins
irr isnihzis/ no Eṣbona lihds Di-
bonam/ mehs effim to isdeldeju-
ſchi lihds Nowu / kas steepjahs
lihds Medbai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta dsihwoja Israëls eeſch
to Amoriteru Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to fuhtiia Mohsus
Jaëseru isluhkoht / un tee us-
warreja winnas Walstas/ un ee-
mantoja tohs Amoriterus / kas
tur bija,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atgreeſahs tee/ un
gahje us angſchn pahr to Bah-
sana Zettu/ un Ogs tas Bahsa-
na Kehninsch isgahje winneem
pretti/ wiſch / un wiſſi winna
Landis kaudamees eeſch Ge-
drejas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas KUNGṣ
us Mohsu : Ne bihſtees preekſch
winnu/ jo es eſmu winnu / un
wiſſus winna Landis/ un wiſſu
winna Semmi tawa Rohkā de-
wis/ un tew buhs winnam dar-
riht/ ittin ka tu darrijis eſti Si-
onam / tam Amoriteru Kehni-
nam/ kas Eṣbonā dsihwoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee aptawe winnu /
un winna Dehlns / un wiſſue
winna Landis/ ta ka neweens at-
lizzinahts tappe/ un tee eeman-
toja winna Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehſahs tee Israëka
Behrni/ un apmettahs Moaba
Klajumds/schai Jardanas Puﬀe
prett Jeriku.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
